overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player exploring a foggy industrial harbor at golden hour. The camera moves along the wooden deck of a steamship, ascends stairs to an upper deck, and reveals a misty waterfront with moored sailing vessels and the Lemoyne warehouse building.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower ship deck facing industrial dock

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden deck of a ship toward the industrial dock area with smokestacks

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the ship's deck with metal fittings
black metal safety railings along the edge of the deck
tall factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke against the cloudy sky
large industrial buildings with corrugated metal roofs along the waterfront
red and black painted smokestack on the ship itself

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on the wooden deck of a ship in a foggy industrial harbor. The camera moves forward toward the dock, passing metal railings on the right, with factory smokestacks and warehouse buildings visible through the haze in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship deck transitioning to upper levels via stairs

events.description: begins ascending metal stairs on the ship's superstructure to reach upper deck

agents.ego_description: walking along the deck and climbing metal stairs to reach the upper deck of the ship

entered.detail: multi-level metal and wood structure of the ship's bridge and cabins
steep metal staircase with railings leading up to upper deck
dark wooden wall of the ship's cabin structure

segments.scene_description: Moving along the narrow deck toward the ship's superstructure, the camera approaches and begins ascending a steep metal staircase. The industrial dock buildings fall behind as the perspective shifts to focus on the ship's internal structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper ship deck overlooking foggy harbor basin

events.description: emerging onto upper deck revealing expansive foggy harbor with moored sailing ships
sun glare intensifies dramatically as camera faces directly into the low golden sun

agents.ego_description: moving along the upper deck observing the foggy harbor and silhouettes of distant moored vessels

entered.detail: tall-masted sailing vessels anchored in the foggy water
calm water surface reflecting the golden light through heavy mist
wooden masts and rigging of docked ships silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the wide upper deck, the scene opens to a breathtaking foggy harbor filled with moored sailing ships. The golden sun creates intense glare through the mist as the camera moves along the deck, revealing masts and rigging silhouetted against the bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper deck alongside Lemoyne warehouse dock

events.description: Lemoyne warehouse building becomes clearly visible through the fog with painted signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the upper deck toward the large warehouse building with visible signage

entered.detail: large wooden industrial warehouse with 'Lemoyne' painted in white letters on the side
weathered wooden dock structures extending into the water
painted signage reading 'Lemoyne' on the warehouse wall becoming prominent

segments.scene_description: Moving along the upper deck toward the dock, the large Lemoyne warehouse emerges from the fog with its painted signage becoming prominent. The camera passes by wooden dock structures while the harbor vessels fade into the mist behind, and industrial smokestacks become visible again in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed wooden deck of a ship into a vast, sun-drenched industrial harbor. It begins by gliding forward along the deck toward the dock, passing metal railings while factory smokestacks and warehouses loom through a dense haze. As the camera approaches the ship's superstructure, it ascends a steep metal staircase, shifting the perspective away from the dock and upward toward the vessel's internal structures. The scene then opens onto a wide upper deck where the fog gives way to an intense golden glare, revealing the silhouettes of moored sailing ships and their rigging against the bright sky. Finally, the camera moves toward the waterfront as the Lemoyne warehouse emerges from the mist with its prominent signage, passing wooden dock structures while the harbor vessels fade back into the hazy distance.
